title: Integrate Kioku indexing and retrieval bridge
acceptance_criteria: RelayHQ emits canonical work-state updates for Kioku indexing
Kioku is used for retrieval only; RelayHQ remains the authoritative source of truth
Indexing handles project, board, task, and approval entities without leaking secrets
Integration is covered by tests for index and retrieval flows
completion_summary: Added Kioku index/update builders and retrieval bridge that resolve hits to canonical RelayHQ state with tests and secret redaction.
